data.raceComments: {"comment":"3. ONE LUCKY DUDE was out of the money last start when 16 metres from the winner in seventh over 1609m at this track. Best form reference might be his win at this track four starts back. Sure to enjoy an economical run from this draw. This doesn't look as hard so he is a major player. 2. POUND SIGN can break his way into the winner's list after registering a sequence of five top-three finishes, the latest at this track a week ago. 9. ROYHILL must be considered after he finished third over 1609m at this track a week ago.","runners":[3,2,9],"exclusive":false}
